name: Return to Orchestrator
summary: Signal task completion and return control
description:
Signal that your delegated task is complete and return control to the orchestrator.

Required fields:
- summary: What you accomplished
- result_assessment: pass/partial/fail/skip/info
- recommendation: proceed/rework/escalate/hold

If you created or updated artifacts, include artifacts_produced with their IDs. This is CRITICAL for workflow continuity - without IDs, the orchestrator cannot pass your work to the next agent.

summary.description: Brief summary of what was accomplished or what's blocking progress

result_assessment.description: Quality assessment of your work product: pass (all good), partial (some issues found), fail (major problems), skip (not applicable to this task), info (informational only, no quality judgment)

recommendation.description: What the orchestrator should do next: proceed (continue workflow), rework (route back for fixes), escalate (needs human decision), hold (blocked, cannot continue)

artifacts_produced.description: IDs of artifacts created or updated during this work

artifacts_ready_for_review.description: IDs of artifacts that are ready for quality gating

blockers.description: If there are issues, what specifically is problematic

acknowledged.description: Whether the return was successfully processed

message_id.description: ID of the delegation_response message sent to orchestrator

examples.description: Scene Smith completes section drafting successfully

input.summary: Drafted section prose for SB-005 with 3 choices as specified in the brief
Cannot complete topology for Act 2 - lighthouse backstory not established

blockers.description: Need lighthouse history and keeper's motivation from canon

examples.description: Gatekeeper finds quality issues that need rework

input.summary: Gatecheck complete - 6/8 bars pass, 2 need rework

blockers.description: Choice Integrity: options 2 and 3 are near-synonyms
Nonlinearity: missing return path from dead end

examples.description: Gatekeeper pre-gate review (reachability is informational only)

input.summary: Pre-gate review complete - Integrity and Nonlinearity pass, Reachability deferred to post-Scene Weave
